title: Wire policy telemetry into runtime frame telemetry or demote claim
rationale: `Policy Telemetry` remains v1-mandatory in spec but runtime TelemetryRecord currently has no policy fields or wiring. Either implement end-to-end runtime emission or shrink the claim to reserved/deferred.
acceptance_criteria: Either `PolicyTelemetry` fields are present in runtime telemetry output with tests, or spec scope is explicitly reduced from v1-mandatory.
Evidence includes runtime-path tests (not policy-crate-only unit tests).

title: Implement runtime arbitration telemetry event emission or re-scope
rationale: Arbitration telemetry event structs exist in `tze_hud_policy`, but reconciliation found no runtime hot-path emission evidence for mandatory L3/L5 and low-rate L2/L4 event requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime emits required arbitration telemetry events with level/code/agent/mutation/timestamp fields.
Tests verify emission semantics from runtime-authoritative paths.

title: Add structured capability grant/revocation audit records or demote mandatory claim
rationale: Spec requires grant/revoke audit entries with agent, capability, timestamp, and source; current wire surfaces (`CapabilityNotice`, `LeaseStateChange`) do not expose an explicit `granted_by` source field.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime emits structured capability audit records (grant + revoke) with required fields.
Protocol/spec/docs align on authoritative audit surface and tests cover both grant and revoke paths.
